scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const source=path.join('frontend','dist'); const target='dist'; fs.rmSync(target,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.cpSync(source,target,{recursive:true});"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace backend
